title: wolftpm-sys build.rs: no wolfTPM version compatibility guard
description: wolftpm-sys/build.rs links against the wolfTPM static library discovered via DEP_WOLFTPM_SRC_* but performs no version check or minimum-version assertion. The shim (wolftpm_rs_shim.c) directly accesses internal wolfTPM struct fields whose layout is not ABI-stable. If a user substitutes a wolfTPM version with a different WOLFTPM2_CTX layout, the build succeeds silently and the shim produces undefined behavior at runtime. A compile-time version assertion (e.g. comparing LIBWOLFTPM_VERSION_HEX) would catch this early.
